---
title: ""
---
[<i class="bi bi-house-door-fill"></i>Home]{style="font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700;"}

[Profile]{style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;"}

-- I'm a graduate student at Kobe University. My major is Econometrics. 

-- [Kyewords]{style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;"}  
- unemployment rate  
- unit root test  
- cyclical trend 
a
